textByHashes.6fe11f4e98d38290712b92a95a0b1e07deaec586: Arrr, what is it that ye be wantin? I can tell ye all about the prices of runes, or perhaps I could combine the charges on yer teleport jewellery.
textByHashes.b2cd4928c0c28a33b5d75a68a3b7b753924b5c69: By my sea-blistered skin, I could ask the same of you!
textByHashes.81d5e27c65c7802fa218766e63dab43b366120e9: No? Then what's that smell? The smell o' someone spent too long at sea without a bath!
textByHashes.3ef64ec98a7904654fb0f33b97bb07860d782844: Har har har! We've got a stern landlubber 'ere! Well, let me tell ye, I'm here for the Grand Exchange! Gonna cash in me loot!
textByHashes.a773c30988486e4bd9267e22a3ee615d023cd70a: By my wave-battered bones! Not when I can sell to the whole world from this very spot!
textByHashes.1d1f32507b4a9989ad0ac24bc41863ab0d66a9f3: Then ye must know me brother! Murky Pat!
textByHashes.35af106f0b7cb0b73ffe36938aebd45650c6fe77: Well, 'e be on that ship for sure. And I remember 'im tellin' me about some guy like ye, getting all mixed up with curses and cabin boys.
textByHashes.b3307210326fb693fc4450ce34d49e7f2e25add6: Well, 'e be on that ship for sure. And I remember 'im tellin' me about some gal like ye, getting all mixed up with curses and cabin boys.
textByHashes.05052d16c0453491c53259460e2bf5b7f09d6bee: Ye sure be a different character.
textByHashes.3413a1b56655d3a986d69c59bebfe3eb09005393: Arrr, ye've got nothing that I can combine.
textByHashes.42e3d8645d1cf1153086f7b1f553f0f4ce957eb2: Arrr, ye've nothing I can combine. Maybe ye needs to take yer stuff up to the Wilderness and charge it on the Fountain of Rune. It be more powerful than me.
textByHashes.59780f2b75515e247fe7b60e7ea01df467efc29d: Arrr, I think ye be a bit short of inventory space.
textByHashes.95dab8432cf12a598f89f73973f8fba9ea42ce91: Arrrr, bring me yer ruby rings to enchant.
textByHashes.54a92f5ae315d9e276a306e0ceacff8bf6992bda: Arrrr, but they arrre 250gp per ring.
textByHashes.2f74e0222867dd7a368c71f05f196d36e4c9b753: Arrr, 250gp per ring. How many would ye like me to enchant?
textByHashes.6ce995187c16a9eb6d2542518b7f7ca8a22d8eaa: Arrr, pleasure doin' business with ya.
textByHashes.977b1f222681fa6a72ee6ccb87ece78e1cb04d05: Defer your speech right there! Quit this derogatory and somewhat narrow-minded allusion that all folks of sea voyage are only concerned with washing the decks, looking after parrots and drinking rum. I'll have ye
textByHashes.e1f7c94114d4831da5ca8b10a1d48f2901e6d250: know there is much more to a pirate than meets the eye.
textByHashes.835e9d1852fe2ac5f20466cf7bcca086f10328be: Arrr, what is it that ye be wantin? I can tell ye all about the prices of runes.
